arts.ttl: Tyreece John-Jules sent Derby County message as transfer wait ends
arts.sum: John-Jules has spent the summer working hard on his fitness having played his part in Derby's promotion last season by scoring the winner in a 1-0 victory at Port Vale. Tyreece John-Jules has ended his long search for a new club after he signed a deal with League One side Crawley Town.

arts.ttl: Derby County head coach Paul Warne makes 'sad' Louie Sibley admission amid text revelation
arts.sum: Derby County head coach Paul Warne has said he misses Louie Sibley and revealed how he congratulated him on his first goal for Oxford United. Sibley turned down a new contract with Derby, having spent 14 years at the club, but signed off memorably by helping the Rams win promotion from League One .
